list.title: Nurses
list.resultsDescription: Browse the nurses available in the hospital.

details.title: Nurse details
details.description: Review nurse assignment and shift details.
details.notFoundDescription: This nurse record is no longer available.

form.formDescription: Fill in the nurse details below.
form.userLinkDescription: Choose whether to link an existing user account or create a new linked login for this nurse.
form.linkExistingUserHint: Attach this nurse to a user account that already exists.
form.createNewLinkedUserHint: Create a login and email the password with a confirmation link.
form.userReadOnlyHint: The linked user account is read only here.
form.userLoadFailedHint: We could not load user accounts right now. You can still choose Create new linked user.
form.emailHint: Required. The password and confirmation link are sent to this address.
form.usernameHint: Optional. Must be at least 3 characters if provided.
form.passwordHint: Optional. If left blank, MedSphere generates one and emails it with the confirmation link.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter nurses by department or shift.

states.loadingOptionsDescription: Please wait while departments are loaded.
states.emptyDescription: Create a nurse to get started.
states.emptyFilteredDescription: Try another shift or clear the filter.
states.emptyDepartmentsDescription: Create a department before adding nurses.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.errorDescription: We could not load nurse data.

errors.list: We could not load the nurses list.
errors.details: We could not load this nurse.
errors.save: We could not save the nurse.
errors.delete: We could not delete the nurse.
errors.departments: We could not load the departments for this screen.

validation.username: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
